items.title: We asked 2,300 Americans about the best and worst things Trump has done. Here’s what they said.
items.description: Immigration was the most divisive issue, with supporters calling it Trump’s best action and critics deeming it his worst.

items.title: Judiciary says courthouses are crumbling nationwide, seeks control over properties
items.description: The Administrative Office of the U.S. Courts says deteriorating conditions have led to safety hazards and health issues.

items.title: U.S. men’s hockey team to be at State of the Union ‘somehow, some way’
items.description: Accommodations are being made for the gold medalists, House Speaker Mike Johnson said Tuesday, a day after the equally successful women’s team decline...

items.title: GOP lawmaker quietly questioned ‘disturbing’ East Wing demolition
items.description: Rep. Michael Turner, co-chair of the congressional Historic Preservation Caucus, wrote to a top White House aide about his “substantial concerns.”
